fields.name: Data Exch. Def Code
fields.tooltip: There is no Help for the fields in this table. This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Table ID
fields.tooltip: There is no Help for the fields in this table. This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Column No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the column in the external file that is mapped to the field in the Target Table ID field, when you are using an intermediate table for data import.

fields.name: Field ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the field in the external file that is mapped to the field in the Target Table ID field, when you are using an intermediate table for data import.

fields.name: Optional
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the map will be skipped if the field is empty. If you do not select this check box, then an export error will occur if the field is empty. When the Use as Intermediate Table check box is selected, the Validate Only check box specifies that the element-to-field map is not used to convert data, but only to validate data.

fields.name: Use Default Value
fields.tooltip: There is no Help for the fields in this table. This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Default Value
fields.tooltip: There is no Help for the fields in this table. This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Data Exch. Line Def Code
fields.tooltip: There is no Help for the fields in this table. This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Target Table ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the table that the value in the Column Caption field is mapped to, when you are using an intermediate table for data import.

fields.name: Target Field ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the field in the target table that the value in the Column Caption field is mapped to, when you are using an intermediate table for data import.

fields.name: Target Table Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the table in the Target Table ID field, which is the table that the value in the Column Caption field is mapped to, when you are using an intermediate table for data import.

fields.name: Target Table Field Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the field in the target table that the value in the Column Caption field is mapped to, when you are using an intermediate table for data import.

fields.name: Transformation Rule
fields.tooltip: Specifies the rule that transforms imported text to a supported value before it can be mapped to a specified field in Microsoft Dynamics 365. When you choose a value in this field, the same value is entered in the Transformation Rule field in the Data Exch. Field Mapping Buf. table and vice versa.

fields.name: Overwrite Value
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the current value will be overwritten by a new value.

fields.name: Priority
fields.tooltip: Specifies the order that the field mappings must be processed. The field mapping with the highest number will be processed first.
